zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon於大約1371年出生在英國斯塔福爾塔爾時，她的父親Rhys Griffith II47歲，母親Isabel de Stackpole21歲。她於1382年5月20日與Richard de Vernon, II在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年在威爾士布洛可爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon于大约1371年出生在英国斯塔福爾塔爾时，她的父亲Rhys Griffith II47岁，母亲Isabel de Stackpole21岁。她于1382年5月20日与Richard de Vernon, II在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年在威尔士布洛可爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon was born about 1371, in Tatenhill, Staffordshire, England, her father, Rhys Griffith II, was 47 and her mother, Isabel de Stackpole, was 21. She married Richard de Vernon, II on 20 May 1382, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1439, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 69, and was buried in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.St James and St Elidyr Churchyard, Stack: Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon est née environ 1371, à Tatenhill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Rhys Griffith II, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Stackpole, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Vernon, II le 20 mai 1382, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon um 1371 in Tatenhill, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys Griffith II 47 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Stackpole 21. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1382 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Vernon, II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1439 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon è nata il circa 1371 nel Tatenhill, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Rhys Griffith II, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Stackpole, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Vernon, II il 20 maggio 1382, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1439, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna ferch Rhys Vernonが約1371年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタテンヒルで生まれた時，父Rhys Griffith IIは47歳，母Isabel de Stackpoleは21歳であった。1382年5月20日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルでRichard de Vernon, IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで69歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスタクプオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타텐힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys Griffith II(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Stackpole(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1382년 5월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Richard de Vernon, II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 스타ck포일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1371, em Tatenhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Rhys Griffith II, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Stackpole, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Vernon, II em 20 de maio de 1382, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1439, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon родилась около 1371 г. в местности тэитенилл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Rhys Griffith II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Stackpole, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Vernon, II 20 мая 1382 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности стаккпол, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon nació aproximadamente 1371, en Tatenhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Rhys Griffith II, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel de Stackpole, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richard de Vernon, II el 20 de mayo de 1382, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1439, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
